work_unit: SZ-BG-H-001: add runtime message validation to handleMessage
situation: audit-2026-07-07-047 found SZ-BG-H-001 (high): handleMessage in src/background/index.ts destructures message fields (settings, imageData, region, id, ocrResults, regions, imageSize) without any runtime type-checking or schema validation. A compromised content script or externally-injected chrome.runtime message could inject a crafted VisionConfig with malicious baseUrl/apiKey that gets persisted via saveSettings and used for all subsequent API calls — credential exfiltration vector.
action: Added validateSettings() function with allowlisted keys at every nesting level (vision/counter/detectionParams), type checks on every field, range validation on numeric params, and enum validation on detectionMethod/segmentationModel. Added isImageDataString() guard requiring data:image/ prefix on imageData fields. Added validateBoundingBox() for region coordinates. Wired validation into saveSettings, deleteHistory, refilter, ocrRegion, and runPipeline message handlers. All invalid inputs return {success:false, error} instead of proceeding.
outcome_evidence: Committed 5fd19ca to auto/opt-background-1783213292, pushed to origin. validateSettings rejects unknown keys, wrong types, out-of-range values. isImageDataString blocks non-data-URI strings. validateBoundingBox enforces numeric coords. All 6 message handlers now validate before processing.
next_suggestion: SZ-PP-H-001: Add file size limit (10MB) to ImageUploader.processFile() to prevent memory bomb via large file base64 encoding
SZ-SH-H-001: Remove host_permissions <all_urls> and activeTab from manifest.json — extension never uses tab/scripting APIs
SZ-BG-H-002: Replace O(n²) blobToBase64 string concatenation with chunked approach in ocr-internal.ts

audit_findings.finding: saveSettings accepted unvalidated message.settings — attacker could inject malicious VisionConfig.baseUrl/apiKey for credential exfiltration
audit_findings.remediation: Added validateSettings() with allowlisted keys, type checks, and range validation before persisting
Added typeof check requiring non-empty string
Added Array.isArray checks, imageSize tuple validation, and validateBoundingBox on each region

audit_findings.finding: ocrRegion accepted unvalidated imageData and region

audit_findings.remediation: Added isImageDataString guard before pipeline execution
